first_run.rationale: The score is identical (6/10), and the core reasoning in the justification and concerns sections is substantively the same. Both evaluations correctly identify the candidate's strengths in full-stack development and tooling, while noting the same key concern: a lack of specific experience with JVM technologies and IDE development. The minor differences in wording and the specific examples of technologies cited (e.g., adding Quarkus) fall within the range of normal run-to-run noise. The model does not appear to have changed its assessment based on the different company names.
